message:
feat(io_driver): implement full IoDriver with reactor integration

- Add IoStats for diagnostics tracking (polls, events, waker dispatches)
- Change reactor from Box<dyn Reactor> to Arc<dyn Reactor>
- Implement register() for full source→waker registration flow
- Implement turn() for I/O event processing with waker dispatch
- Implement wake() for cross-thread reactor wakeup
- Add update_waker() for changing wakers between polls
- Add comprehensive test suite (11 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
